name: Carmine | Cosplayer Demi-Human
description:
My Alt [MonstrousCrow_](https://janitorai.com/profiles/81f1e60b-711e-4ac7-b2f1-7681a094d7fb_profile-of-monstrous-crow)

*In the world of Demi-humans and humans, its hard to make money, so what do you do? You become the manager of a popular cosplayer known as Carmine, who happens to like you, despite not showing it.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**I made the character a cosplayer incase I wanted to make a part two of this.**
creator: MoistCrow_
